title: Van Druten’s bail hearing approaches: Uncertainty reigns outside court
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The tension is subdued...
bodyText:
[{"type":"contributor","text":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorName":"Marguerite van Ginkel","contributorDate":"Friday, 06 February 2026, 10:08"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today for his fourth appearance in the matter."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The tension is subdued at the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court as those gathered wait to be called into the courtroom for Bevan van Druten’s (53) fourth appearance. Today moves at a slower, more subdued pace.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The tension is subdued at the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court as those gathered wait to be called into the courtroom for Bevan van Druten’s (53) fourth appearance. Today moves at a slower, more subdued pace."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many of the people to whom George Herald spoke say they are unsure what to expect from today’s proceedings.","html":"Many of the people to whom George Herald spoke say they are unsure what to expect from today’s proceedings."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"For Nicky van Heerden’s (54) close friends and family, time feels suspended."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Having had little opportunity to process the shock of her death, they are hoping the bail hearing will bring some measure of clarity and perhaps the first real opportunity to begin the grieving process.","html":"Having had little opportunity to process the shock of her death, they are hoping the bail hearing will bring some measure of clarity and perhaps the first real opportunity to begin the grieving process."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"4th court appearance for van Druten as bail hearing ties upTrail of alleged abuse and intimidationFamily seeks justice for Nicky van HeerdenPlettenberg Bay murder case: Bail hearing postponed again for Garden Route artist accused of killing partnerMurder accused Bevan van Druten bail hearing delayed due to lack of legal representationSpiritual leader denies involvement in murder after allegations on social mediaNicky van Heerden murder: Suspect appears in courtSedgefield man to appear in court for former Plettenberg Bay detective’s murder","html":"
  • 4th court appearance for van Druten as bail hearing ties up
  • Trail of alleged abuse and intimidation
  • Family seeks justice for Nicky van Heerden
  • Plettenberg Bay murder case: Bail hearing postponed again for Garden Route artist accused of killing partner
  • Murder accused Bevan van Druten bail hearing delayed due to lack of legal representation
  • Spiritual leader denies involvement in murder after allegations on social media
  • Nicky van Heerden murder: Suspect appears in court
  • Sedgefield man to appear in court for former Plettenberg Bay detective’s murder
    • "}]

images.alt: Van Druten’s bail hearing approaches: Uncertainty reigns outside court

author: Marguerite van Ginkel
teaser: Bevan van Druten (53), accused of murdering his girlfriend, Nicky van Heerden (54), is due back in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today for his fourth appearance in the matter.
featuredCaption: For Nicky van Heerden’s close friends and family, time feels suspended.
